title: GENERAL METHODS OF ANALYSIS FOR FOOD ADDITIVES CXS 239-2003 Adopted in 2003.

sections.section: GENERAL METHODS OF ANALYSIS FOR FOOD ADDITIVES CXS 239-2003 Adopted in 2003.
sections.summary: Provides general methods of analysis for food additives (CXS 239-2003) with a table listing specific analytical methods, principles (e.g., HPLC, spectrophotometry, Monier‑Williams, enzymatic) and referenced standards for additives such as acesulfame K, aspartame, cyclamate, saccharin, nitrates/nitrites and sulphites.
